name: UMC Fab 12i
location: Pasir Ris Wafer Fab Park, Singapore
description: front-end foundry manufacturing anchor
relevance_to_umc: Direct UMC regional manufacturing anchor for 22/28nm and specialty technology strategy.
decision_relevance: Baseline asset around which all Southeast Asia sales, support, back-end adjacency, and partner options should be evaluated.

name: Singapore EDB semiconductor industry platform
description: national investment promotion, ecosystem coordination, and industry development
relevance_to_umc: Supports Singapore as a stable, institutionally backed regional anchor for manufacturing and customer assurance.
decision_relevance: EDB ecosystem support is relevant for future site, supplier, workforce, ESG, and customer-coverage discussions around Fab 12i.

name: GlobalFoundries Singapore expansion fab
description: front-end foundry manufacturing
relevance_to_umc: Peer foundry expansion validates Singapore as a premium manufacturing location for mature and specialty-node capacity.
decision_relevance: Reinforces that Singapore can support multiple foundry anchors, but also intensifies talent and utilities competition.

name: Micron Singapore Fab 10B / HBM assembly plan
location: North Coast Wafer Fab Park, Singapore
description: memory wafer fabrication and HBM assembly
relevance_to_umc: Reinforces Singapore advanced manufacturing depth while highlighting land, power, and engineering-talent competition.
decision_relevance: Important signal for Fab 12i utilities, ESG, workforce, and supplier-infrastructure constraints.

name: A*STAR Institute of Microelectronics
description: applied semiconductor R&D, prototyping, and ecosystem collaboration
relevance_to_umc: Relevant to specialty technology, silicon photonics, heterogeneous integration, and customer co-development ecosystem.
decision_relevance: Could support technical collaboration and talent pipeline around Fab 12i-adjacent specialty applications.

name: Applied Materials Singapore
description: wafer fab equipment, services, and process-support ecosystem
relevance_to_umc: Equipment and services depth supports Fab 12i uptime, process support, and future manufacturing optionality.
decision_relevance: Supplier proximity can reduce service response friction and support equipment ecosystem scoring.

name: UTAC Singapore
description: semiconductor test and assembly services
relevance_to_umc: Provides back-end and test adjacency for customers using Singapore manufacturing or regional supply chains.
decision_relevance: Potential partner or comparable for test, reliability, and customer quality-support workflows around Fab 12i output.

name: Malaysia National Semiconductor Strategy
description: policy, incentives, talent, IC design, advanced packaging, equipment, and manufacturing roadmap
relevance_to_umc: Makes Malaysia the strongest non-Singapore policy platform for staged packaging, support, and partner-led expansion.
decision_relevance: Malaysia can complement Fab 12i through near-region OSAT, support, and specialty/power semiconductor adjacency.

name: Intel Malaysia advanced packaging expansion
description: back-end manufacturing, packaging, and test
relevance_to_umc: Validates Malaysia as a global-scale back-end and packaging hub with engineering depth.
decision_relevance: Strong candidate ecosystem for back-end partnerships and customer qualification support near Singapore.

name: Infineon Kulim SiC power semiconductor fab
description: front-end power semiconductor manufacturing
relevance_to_umc: Strong specialty, power, and automotive adjacency for UMC mature-node and specialty customer base.
decision_relevance: Supports a Singapore-Malaysia corridor for power, automotive, and industrial customers.

name: ASE Malaysia / Penang OSAT operations
description: assembly, packaging, and test
relevance_to_umc: Major OSAT presence strengthens Penang as a partner-led packaging and customer-support candidate.
decision_relevance: Penang can complement Singapore wafer output with nearby back-end and test capabilities.

name: Inari Amertron
description: outsourced assembly, RF test, and electronics services
relevance_to_umc: Adds local OSAT/test density and RF/connectivity customer adjacency.
decision_relevance: Supports back-end and customer-engineering corridor logic between Fab 12i and Malaysia.

name: Unisem Malaysia
location: Ipoh, Perak and other Malaysia operations
description: semiconductor assembly and test
relevance_to_umc: Adds mature OSAT capacity and back-end supplier depth.
decision_relevance: Potential customer-support and back-end partner reference for Fab 12i customers.

name: Oppstar
description: IC design, design services, and semiconductor engineering talent
relevance_to_umc: Adds design-services and engineering talent depth near the Penang OSAT cluster.
decision_relevance: Can support design enablement, customer engineering, and DFM conversations for regional customers.

name: Penang Silicon Design @5km+ / chip design talent ecosystem
description: design talent, workforce development, and ecosystem clustering
relevance_to_umc: Improves Malaysia suitability for customer engineering, design support, and account-technical roles.
decision_relevance: Helps build a nearby engineering-support base for Fab 12i customers.

name: Amkor Technology Vietnam
location: Yen Phong II-C Industrial Park, Bac Ninh, Vietnam
description: advanced SiP assembly and test
relevance_to_umc: Best verified Vietnam back-end anchor for advanced packaging and customer support monitoring.
decision_relevance: Potential future back-end adjacency for Fab 12i customer flows, though maturity is lower than Malaysia.

name: Hana Micron Vietnam
description: semiconductor assembly, packaging, and test
relevance_to_umc: Adds a second Korean-linked back-end anchor in Vietnam northern electronics corridor.
decision_relevance: Potential partner-monitoring item for packaging/test services near key EMS clusters.

name: Intel Products Vietnam
location: Saigon Hi-Tech Park, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description: back-end assembly and test manufacturing
relevance_to_umc: Demonstrates Vietnam can operate high-volume semiconductor back-end manufacturing for a global IDM.
decision_relevance: Useful comparable for operational maturity, customer engineering, and back-end workforce development.

name: FPT Semiconductor
location: Hanoi / Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description: chip design, power management ICs, and local design talent development
relevance_to_umc: Supports Vietnam emerging fabless/design-services ecosystem and long-term foundry customer development.
decision_relevance: Potential future design/customer pipeline for mature-node or specialty foundry engagement.

name: Vietnam National Innovation Center semiconductor initiatives
location: Hanoi / Hoa Lac and national programs
description: workforce development, innovation programs, and ecosystem partnerships
relevance_to_umc: Supports long-term customer engineering and design-support talent assumptions.
decision_relevance: Could provide future engineering pipeline for Fab 12i customer support coverage.

name: Samsung Vietnam electronics manufacturing cluster
location: Bac Ninh, Thai Nguyen, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
description: downstream electronics manufacturing and supplier ecosystem
relevance_to_umc: Supports customer proximity for consumer, display, connectivity, IoT, and electronics supply-chain accounts.
decision_relevance: Demand-side support option rather than direct Fab 12i manufacturing extension.

name: Vietnam semiconductor industry development strategy
description: policy roadmap for design, packaging, workforce, and ecosystem development
relevance_to_umc: Supports Vietnam as an emerging long-term customer engineering and design-support market.
decision_relevance: Useful for monitoring future Fab 12i customer-support coverage, not immediate fab expansion.

name: Thailand Board of Investment semiconductor / electronics incentives
description: investment promotion and incentives
relevance_to_umc: Supports Thailand as a policy-backed watchlist for electronics, power, sensors, automotive, and industrial demand.
decision_relevance: Useful for sales/support coverage from Singapore into automotive and industrial customer clusters.

name: Eastern Economic Corridor electronics / automotive cluster
description: downstream electronics, automotive, EV, logistics, and industrial manufacturing corridor
relevance_to_umc: Strong demand-side fit for automotive, industrial, power, connectivity, and display-related mature-node customers.
decision_relevance: Good candidate for customer coverage from Singapore Fab 12i rather than direct manufacturing expansion.

name: Analog Devices Thailand
description: semiconductor test and support operations
relevance_to_umc: Validates Thailand as a location for analog and mixed-signal semiconductor test activity linked to UMC-relevant customer segments.
decision_relevance: Supports Thailand coverage for analog, power, sensor, automotive, and industrial customers served from Fab 12i.

name: UTAC Thailand
description: semiconductor assembly and test services
relevance_to_umc: Adds packaging/test adjacency in Thailand for mature-node and mixed-signal customer support.
decision_relevance: Potential downstream test-support node for Fab 12i customer workflows.

name: Stars Microelectronics Thailand
description: assembly, test, electronics manufacturing, and module services
relevance_to_umc: Local semiconductor/electronics manufacturing supplier relevant to customer support and back-end partner mapping.
decision_relevance: Supports Thailand as a customer engineering and back-end watchlist around Fab 12i customers.

name: Thailand HDD and precision electronics manufacturing cluster
location: Bangkok metro, Ayutthaya, Chonburi, and related industrial zones
description: precision electronics, storage, motors, sensors, and supply-chain manufacturing
relevance_to_umc: Mature electronics manufacturing supports demand mapping for mature-node analog, power, sensors, motor-control, and connectivity ICs.
decision_relevance: Supports sales/support coverage from Singapore into Thailand industrial electronics customers.

name: Philippines semiconductor ecosystem
description: semiconductor ecosystem assessment and development recommendations
relevance_to_umc: Supports Philippines as a support, assembly/test, and account-operations candidate rather than near-term front-end fab location.
decision_relevance: Potential support hub for Fab 12i customers requiring documentation, quality, logistics, and account operations.

name: Texas Instruments Philippines
description: semiconductor assembly, test, and manufacturing support
relevance_to_umc: Validates Philippines back-end semiconductor operations and analog/embedded customer relevance.
decision_relevance: Useful comparable for customer engineering and manufacturing-support hub models.

name: Analog Devices Philippines
description: semiconductor test facility
relevance_to_umc: Aligns with UMC analog, power, automotive, industrial, and sensor customer segments.
decision_relevance: Supports Philippines as a remote/nearshore support node for mature-node and specialty customers.

name: Integrated Micro-Electronics and PSi Technologies
description: electronics manufacturing, power semiconductor assembly, and test services
relevance_to_umc: Supports power, automotive, industrial, and electronics customer support use cases.
decision_relevance: Potential support and quality-coordination ecosystem for Fab 12i customers with Philippines back-end or EMS flows.

name: Amkor Philippines
description: semiconductor package and test services
relevance_to_umc: Adds OSAT depth and long-running back-end semiconductor experience.
decision_relevance: Potential comparable/partner ecosystem for support and back-end routing decisions.

name: Clark and CALABARZON electronics / logistics corridor
description: industrial parks, logistics, electronics manufacturing, and support operations
relevance_to_umc: Supports low-capex account operations, logistics coordination, and technical support hub options.
decision_relevance: Possible distributed customer-support node for Fab 12i customers across ASEAN.

name: Batam electronics and logistics cluster
description: electronics manufacturing, logistics, and Singapore-adjacent industrial base
relevance_to_umc: Supports low-cost customer-support and logistics watchlist near Singapore, but not a foundry base.
decision_relevance: Singapore proximity makes Batam relevant for low-cost support/logistics adjacency around Fab 12i.

name: PT Sat Nusapersada
description: electronics manufacturing and assembly services
relevance_to_umc: Adds downstream electronics manufacturing evidence for Indonesia demand and support coverage.
decision_relevance: Potential customer-support/logistics coverage point for electronics customers served from Singapore.

name: Infineon Batam operations
description: semiconductor back-end manufacturing
relevance_to_umc: Supports Indonesia limited semiconductor manufacturing evidence, especially for power and industrial semiconductor supply chains.
decision_relevance: Relevant to power/industrial customer-support coverage near Singapore, but not a Fab 12i manufacturing extension.

name: Indonesia EV and automotive electronics demand cluster
location: Jakarta, West Java, Central Java, and industrial zones
description: EV battery, automotive, consumer electronics, and industrial demand
relevance_to_umc: Long-term demand-side option for automotive, power, connectivity, consumer, and industrial IC customers.
decision_relevance: Supports market-development coverage from Singapore rather than manufacturing investment.

name: Batamindo Industrial Park
description: industrial estate, manufacturing infrastructure, and Singapore-linked logistics
relevance_to_umc: Potential low-cost support/logistics adjacency for Singapore Fab 12i, but not a semiconductor manufacturing anchor by itself.
decision_relevance: Could support non-fab activities near Singapore if UMC wants cost-flexible operations.

name: Danantara Indonesia
description: strategic investment vehicle and industrial-policy funding platform
relevance_to_umc: Potential policy/investment counterparty if Indonesia pursues semiconductor design, training, or supply-chain security programs.
decision_relevance: Could matter only if paired with verified semiconductor workforce or Arm/IP partnership; otherwise it is a macro policy signal.
